member.summary: Returns an object to the pool. The object is reset according to the pool policy.

member.returns: The number of objects removed from the pool.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Abstractions.IPool`1.RentHandle
member.summary: Rents an object wrapped in a disposable handle for automatic return.
member.returns: A handle that returns the object when disposed.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Abstractions.IPool`1.Rent
member.summary: Rents an object from the pool. Creates a new instance if the pool is empty.
member.returns: A pooled object instance.
member.exception: Thrown when the pool is at capacity and cannot create new objects.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for values including bounds checking, mapping, and approximate floating-point comparisons via .

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.ApproxEquals(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines whether this value is approximately equal to using robust comparison.
member.param: Absolute epsilon tolerance. Must be non-negative.
Relative epsilon tolerance. Must be non-negative.
member.returns: true if the values are considered equal within tolerance; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Determines whether this value is approximately zero.

member.returns: true if the value is effectively zero within tolerance; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Determines whether this value is approximately greater than .
member.param: Absolute epsilon tolerance. Must be non-negative.
Relative epsilon tolerance. Must be non-negative.
member.returns: true if this value is strictly greater than beyond tolerance.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.IsApproxGreaterThanOrEqual(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines whether this value is approximately greater than or equal to .
member.param: Absolute epsilon tolerance. Must be non-negative.
Relative epsilon tolerance. Must be non-negative.
member.returns: true if this value is greater than or approximately equal to .

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.IsApproxLessThan(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines whether this value is approximately less than .

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.IsApproxLessThanOrEqual(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines whether this value is approximately less than or equal to .

Relative epsilon tolerance. Must be non-negative.
member.returns: true if this value is less than or approximately equal to .

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.ApproxSign(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the sign of this value, treating values approximately zero as zero.
member.param: Absolute epsilon tolerance. Must be non-negative.
member.returns: -1, 0, or 1 indicating the approximate sign of the value.

member.summary: Determines whether is within the inclusive range defined by and .
member.returns: true if is greater than or equal to and less than or equal to ; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.Map(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Maps a value from one range to another, preserving proportional distance.
member.param: The minimum bound of the source range.
The maximum bound of the source range.
The minimum bound of the target range.
The maximum bound of the target range.
member.returns: The corresponding value in [, ] that maps linearly from in [, ].
member.remarks: The output is not clamped. If is outside the source range, the result will be proportionally outside the target range.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.ThrowIfLessOrEqualThan(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Ensures the floating point value is greater than the specified minimum. Throws if the value is less than or equal to .
member.returns: The float value if it is valid.
member.exception: Thrown if is less than or equal to .

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.ThrowIfLessThan(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Ensures the floating point value is greater than or equal to the specified minimum. Throws if the value is less than .
member.returns: The float value if it is valid.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.FloatExtensions.ThrowIfOverOrEqualThan(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Ensures the floating point value is less than the specified maximum. Throws if the value is greater than or equal to .

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.GenericExtensions
member.summary: A collection of frequently-used helper methods that extend the capabilities of any type. All members are implemented as pure functions (no side-effects) and therefore can be safely used in LINQ queries, unit-tests or anywhere short, expressive code is preferred.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.GenericExtensions.IsBetween``1(``0,``0,``0)
member.summary: Determines whether is within the inclusive range defined by and .
member.typeparam: A type that implements .
member.returns: true if is greater than or equal to and less than or equal to ; otherwise, false.
member.exception: Thrown if any argument is null.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.GenericExtensions.IsDefault``1(``0)
member.summary: Determines whether equals the default value for its type.
member.typeparam: A value type.
member.returns: true if equals default(T); otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.GenericExtensions.IsNull``1(``0)
member.summary: Determines whether a value is .
member.typeparam: The type of the input.
member.param: The value to check for null.
member.returns: true if is null; otherwise, false.
member.remarks: An unconstrained generic is used so that both reference and value-types wrapped in Nullable<T> are supported.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.GenericExtensions.IsOneOf``1(``0,``0[])
member.summary: Determines whether is equal to any element in .
member.typeparam: The type being compared.
member.param: One or more values to compare against.
member.returns: true if equals any element in ; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.GenericExtensions.Yield``1(``0)
member.summary: Wraps a single item into an containing that item. Handy for providing single elements to APIs expecting an enumerable.
member.typeparam: The type of the item.
member.returns: containing the specified .
member.remarks: Returns a zero-allocation struct enumerable instead of using iterator state machine.

member.summary: Throws an exception if the provided predicate expression evaluates to true for the specified value.
member.typeparam: The type of the value being checked.
member.param: The predicate expression used for validation.
A custom exception to throw if the condition is met (optional).
member.returns: The validated value if the condition is not satisfied.
member.exception: Thrown if the predicate evaluates to true for .
member.remarks: Compiled expressions are cached for repeated invocations with the same predicate structure.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.GenericExtensions.ThrowIf``1(``0,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the boolean is true.

Name of the parameter related to the exception.
An optional custom message for the exception.
member.returns: The value if is false.

member.summary: Throws an if the sequence is empty.

member.returns: The non-empty .

member.summary: Throws an if is . The method returns the non-null value, thus enabling fluent use.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Extensions.StringExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for formatting strings with color tags. Includes convenience methods for common colors and color forms.
Provides extension methods for common string empty/null/whitespace checks, following .NET semantics.
Provides extension methods for formatting strings with various text markup and transformations.

member.returns: The string wrapped in a <color> tag.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer
member.summary:
Helper class for robust double-precision floating-point number comparisons. Handles precision issues inherent in floating-point arithmetic.
Usage guidance: - Use AreEqual for small numbers or when absolute difference matters - Use AreEqualRelative for large numbers or when relative difference matters - Use AreEqualRobust when dealing with unknown magnitude ranges (recommended default)

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.DEFAULT_DOUBLE_EPSILON
member.summary: Default absolute epsilon for double comparisons.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.DEFAULT_DOUBLE_RELATIVE_EPSILON
member.summary: Default relative epsilon for double relative comparisons.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.DOUBLE_ULP_EPSILON
member.summary: ULP (Unit in the Last Place) epsilon for double: approximately double.Epsilon * 2^52. Provides a cushion for boundary rounding errors in relative comparisons.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.AreEqual(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Determines if two double values are equal using absolute epsilon comparison.
member.param: Absolute epsilon tolerance (default: 1e-15). Must be non-negative.
member.returns: True if the values are considered equal within the epsilon tolerance

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.AreEqualRelative(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Determines if two double values are equal using relative epsilon comparison. Better for comparing larger numbers. Falls back to absolute comparison for near-zero values.
member.param: Absolute epsilon fallback for near-zero values (default: 1e-15). Must be non-negative.
Relative epsilon tolerance (default: 1e-14). Must be non-negative.
member.returns: True if the values are considered equal within the relative tolerance

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.AreEqualRobust(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Robust comparison using both absolute and relative epsilon. Uses absolute epsilon for numbers close to zero, relative epsilon for larger numbers.
member.param: Absolute epsilon tolerance (default: 1e-15). Must be non-negative.
Relative epsilon tolerance (default: 1e-14). Must be non-negative.
member.returns: True if the values are considered equal

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.IsGreaterThan(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Determines if the first double is greater than the second using robust comparison.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.IsGreaterThanOrEqual(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Determines if the first double is greater than or equal to the second using robust comparison.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.IsLessThan(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Determines if the first double is less than the second using robust comparison.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.IsLessThanOrEqual(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Determines if the first double is less than or equal to the second using robust comparison.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.IsZero(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Determines if a double value is effectively zero.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.DoubleComparer.Sign(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns the sign of a double value, treating values close to zero as zero.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.ExceptionHelper
member.summary: Provides helper methods for constructing and throwing exceptions with rich context information.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.ExceptionHelper.ThrowException``1(System.Object,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an exception of the specified type with a formatted message including optional object instance, method name, and additional message.
member.typeparam: The exception type to be thrown.
member.param: The instance on which the exception occurred, or null if unknown.
The name of the method where the exception occurred (optional).
member.exception: Thrown if exception of type could not be created via reflection.
member.remarks: The generated exception message will include the exception type, (optionally) the object type, method name, and error message.

member.summary: Throws an exception of the specified type with the provided error message.
member.typeparam: The exception type to throw.
member.param: The error message to include in the exception.
member.exception: Thrown if exception of type could not be created via reflection.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.ExceptionHelper.FormatExceptionMessage(System.String,System.Object,System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats a detailed exception message including exception type, object context, method, parameter names and an additional message.
member.param: The type name of the exception.
The instance on which the exception occurred (optional).
The name of the method where the exception occurred (optional).
The detailed message explaining the error (optional).
A list of parameter names or objects to identify which parameters are related to the exception (optional).
member.returns: A formatted string suitable for use as an exception message.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.ExceptionHelper.FormatParamNames(System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats parameter information for inclusion in an exception message.
member.param: A list of parameter objects to be formatted.
member.returns: A comma-separated string of parameter type names, or an empty string if is empty.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer
member.summary:
Helper class for robust single-precision floating-point number comparisons. Handles precision issues inherent in floating-point arithmetic.
Usage guidance: - Use AreEqual for small numbers or when absolute difference matters - Use AreEqualRelative for large numbers or when relative difference matters - Use AreEqualRobust when dealing with unknown magnitude ranges (recommended default)

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.DEFAULT_FLOAT_EPSILON
member.summary: Default absolute epsilon for float comparisons.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.DEFAULT_FLOAT_RELATIVE_EPSILON
member.summary: Default relative epsilon for float relative comparisons.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.FLOAT_ULP_EPSILON
member.summary: ULP (Unit in the Last Place) epsilon for float: approximately float.Epsilon * 2^23. Provides a cushion for boundary rounding errors in relative comparisons.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.AreEqual(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines if two float values are equal using absolute epsilon comparison.
member.param: Absolute epsilon tolerance (default: 1e-6f). Must be non-negative.
member.returns: True if the values are considered equal within the epsilon tolerance

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.AreEqualRelative(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines if two float values are equal using relative epsilon comparison. Better for comparing larger numbers. Falls back to absolute comparison for near-zero values.
member.param: Absolute epsilon fallback for near-zero values (default: 1e-6f). Must be non-negative.
Relative epsilon tolerance (default: 1e-5f). Must be non-negative.
member.returns: True if the values are considered equal within the relative tolerance

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.AreEqualRobust(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Robust comparison using both absolute and relative epsilon. Uses absolute epsilon for numbers close to zero, relative epsilon for larger numbers.
member.param: Absolute epsilon tolerance (default: 1e-6f). Must be non-negative.
Relative epsilon tolerance (default: 1e-5f). Must be non-negative.
member.returns: True if the values are considered equal

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.IsGreaterThan(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines if the first float is greater than the second using robust comparison.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.IsGreaterThanOrEqual(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines if the first float is greater than or equal to the second using robust comparison.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.IsLessThan(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines if the first float is less than the second using robust comparison.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.IsLessThanOrEqual(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines if the first float is less than or equal to the second using robust comparison.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.IsZero(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Determines if a float value is effectively zero.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Helpers.FloatComparer.Sign(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the sign of a float value, treating values close to zero as zero.

member.summary: Encapsulates the outcome of searching for an element in an array.

Thread Safety: This type is immutable and therefore thread-safe.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Types.Singleton`1
member.summary: A robust, thread-safe, and highly flexible Singleton base class. Features: - Lazy, thread-safe publication of the default instance - Configurable creation factory (before or with reinitialization) - Scoped runtime overrides for testing or special scenarios - Reset support with optional disposal of existing instances - Safe TryGet and state inspection helpers - Protective construction checks to prevent unauthorized instantiation
member.typeparam: The singleton's concrete type. Must be a reference type.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Types.Singleton`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the singleton type. Direct construction is disallowed; instances must be created via the internal guarded factory.
member.exception: Thrown when constructed outside allowed guarded paths.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Types.Singleton`1.Initialize(System.Func{`0})
member.summary: Initializes the singleton by eagerly creating and setting an override instance using the provided factory. Fails if an instance already exists or an override is active.
member.param: Factory used to create the override instance.
member.exception: When the singleton is already created or overridden.

member.summary: Indicates whether an override instance is currently active.

member.summary: Indicates whether the singleton instance has been created (either override or default).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Core.Types.Singleton`1.Instance
member.summary: Gets the active singleton instance: an override if available, otherwise the lazily created one.

member.summary: Attempts to get the current instance without forcing initialization.
member.param: Receives the instance if already created or overridden; otherwise null.
member.returns: True if an instance is available; false otherwise.

member.summary: Temporarily overrides the singleton instance with a new instance produced by . Returns a disposable scope that restores the previous state upon disposal.
member.param: Factory used to create the override instance.
member.returns: An IDisposable scope that restores the previous instance on Dispose.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Types.Singleton`1.ConfigureFactory(System.Func{`0},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures the creation factory. Optionally recreates the instance(s).
member.param: A non-null delegate that returns a non-null instance.
When true, disposes and recreates both override and default instances using the new factory.

member.summary: Resets the singleton to its initial state. Optionally disposes existing instances (override and default).
member.param: If true, disposes IDisposable instances before resetting.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Types.SwapbackArray`1
member.summary: Represents a dynamic array supporting fast O(1) removal by swapping the last element into the position of the removed item. This array does not preserve element order but offers efficient add and remove operations. Capacity expands automatically.

member.remarks: The array is ideal for scenarios where element order is unimportant and high-performance removals are desired. Implements for enumeration. Use , , , etc. for mutation.

summary.para: Provides utility methods for safe execution of functions and actions with exception handling. Supports both result-based patterns (Try*) and exception-throwing patterns (Do/Get).

member.typeparam: The type of the return value.
member.param: Optional callback invoked when an exception occurs.
member.returns: A tuple containing success status and the result (default if failed).

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Types.Try.TryDo(System.Action,System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Executes an action safely and returns whether it succeeded.
member.param: Optional callback invoked when an exception occurs.
member.returns: True if the action executed successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Types.Try.GetOrDefault``1(System.Func{``0},``0,System.Action{System.Exception})

member.param: The value to return if the function fails.

member.returns: The result of the function execution, or defaultValue if it fails.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags
member.summary: Provides a thread-safe manager for registering, retrieving, and substituting string tags in text. Tags are registered globally and can be replaced with dynamic or constant values in incoming strings.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.Tags
member.summary: Stores the mapping of tag names to their associated value provider functions.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.TagNamePattern
member.summary: Regular expression used to validate allowed tag name formats (letters, digits, underscores).

member.name: F:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.TagPattern
member.summary: Regular expression to parse unescaped tag references in the form {tagName} within input strings. Supports escaping with backslashes (e.g., \{tagName\}).

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.GetRegisteredTags
member.summary: Gets an enumerable containing all registered tag names.
member.returns: A collection of currently registered tag names.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.Process(System.String)
member.summary: Processes an input string, replacing each registered tag reference with its resolved value. Tag references must be in the form {tagName}. Escaped braces (e.g. \{tag\}) are left as literals.
member.returns: The processed string, with all valid tag references replaced by their resolved values. Escaped tags are unescaped to braces.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.Clear
member.summary: Removes all registered tags from the manager.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.Register(System.String,System.Func{System.Object},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Registers a tag with a value provider function.
member.param: The name of the tag to register. Must be non-null and consist only of letters, digits, or underscores.
A delegate that provides the value for this tag.
If true, overwrites any tag already registered with the same name. If false, throws if the tag exists.
member.exception: Thrown if is null, empty, whitespace, or contains invalid characters.
Thrown if the tag is already registered and is false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.RegisterValue(System.String,System.Object,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Registers a tag that always returns a constant value.
member.param: The name of the tag to register.
A constant value to be used for this tag.
If true, overwrites any tag already registered with the same name. If false, throws if the tag exists.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.StringTags.Unregister(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a registered tag by name, if it exists.
member.param: The name of the tag to remove.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.TicketLock
member.summary: Provides FIFO ticket-based ordering for coordinated access across multiple callers.
member.remarks: Thread-safe. Use to serialize mutations that must be ordered relative to each other.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.TicketLock.SyncRoot
member.summary: Gets the synchronization object used by this ticket lock.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Core.Utilities.TicketLock.ExecuteOrdered(System.Action)
